rss.title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship on way to Canary Islands after three evacuated
rss.snippet: A British man is among three evacuees sent to the Netherlands after displaying symptoms while aboard the MV Hondius.

rss.title: Iran considering US proposal as Trump says war will be 'over quickly'
rss.snippet: Mediator Pakistan says it is "endeavouring to convert this ceasefire into a permanent end to this war".

rss.title: Islamic State-linked women arrive home in Australia from Syria
rss.snippet: A group of nine women and children has landed in Melbourne while another woman and her child arrived in Sydney.

podcast: [Why social health is key to happiness and longevity | Kasley Killam (re-release)] You know it's important to take care of your physical and mental health. But what about your social health? Social scientist Kasley Killam shows how feeling a sense of belonging and connection has concrete benefits to your overall health — and explains why it may be the missing key to living a longer and happier life.This episode originally aired in 2025.Learn more about our flagship conference ha
